chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Man Performing Tawaf on Behalf of Another Man, Whether He is Absent or Present.

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ

text: : «إِذَا أَرَدْتَ أَنْ تَطُوفَ عَنْ أَحَدٍ مِنْ إِخْوَانِكَ فَائْتِ اَلْحَجَرَ اَلْأَسْوَدَ وَ قُلْ بِسْمِ اَللَّهِ اَللَّهُمَّ تَقَبَّلْ مِنْ فُلاَنٍ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2829 - It is narrated from Muawiyah ibn Ammar, from Abu Abdullah (as), that he said:
"If you wish to perform Tawaf on behalf of one of your brothers, go to the Black Stone and say,
'In the name of Allah (swt), O Allah (swt), accept this on behalf of [the name of the person].'"
